prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance ranking questions.

For each question, given an anchor object, rank all other listed objects by their 3D distance
from the anchor, from nearest to farthest. Answer with a JSON list of object IDs in order.
If two objects appear at very similar distances, give your best estimate — close pairs are scored with tolerance.

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a list of object ID strings).

Example:
[{"qid": "fdr_0001", "answer": ["obj_2", "obj_1", "obj_3"]}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large gray metal sphere
  - obj_1: large blue metal cube
  - obj_2: large red metal sphere
  - obj_3: large purple rubber sphere
  - obj_4: large cyan rubber sphere

Questions:
[fdr_0001] Rank all other objects by distance from obj_0, nearest to farthest. Objects to rank: obj_1, obj_2, obj_3, obj_4. Answer: ordered JSON list of object IDs.
[fdr_0002] Rank all other objects by distance from obj_1, nearest to farthest. Objects to rank: obj_0, obj_2, obj_3, obj_4. Answer: ordered JSON list of object IDs.
[fdr_0003] Rank all other objects by distance from obj_2, nearest to farthest. Objects to rank: obj_0, obj_1, obj_3, obj_4. Answer: ordered JSON list of object IDs.
[fdr_0004] Rank all other objects by distance from obj_3, nearest to farthest. Objects to rank: obj_0, obj_1, obj_2, obj_4. Answer: ordered JSON list of object IDs.
[fdr_0005] Rank all other objects by distance from obj_4, nearest to farthest. Objects to rank: obj_0, obj_1, obj_2, obj_3. Answer: ordered JSON list of object IDs.

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects across multiple images to answer these distance ranking questions.

Looking at the images, I can identify the objects and their approximate 3D positions:

From the images:
- obj_0: gray metal sphere (center area)
- obj_1: blue metal cube (varies by image - behind/front)
- obj_2: red metal sphere (front/behind area)
- obj_3: purple rubber sphere (front-left or right area)
- obj_4: cyan rubber sphere (behind or right area)

Let me analyze each image carefully to determine consistent 3D positions:

Image 1 (left): red ball (back-left), gray ball (center), cyan ball (front), purple ball (back-right), blue cube (right)
Image 2 (right): cyan ball (back), gray ball (center-right), purple ball (front-left), blue cube (front), red ball (right)
Image 3 (left): blue cube (left), purple ball (front), gray ball (center), cyan ball (right), red ball (far right)
Image 4 (right): purple ball (left), red ball (front-center), gray ball (center), blue cube (back-center), cyan ball (right)

Given the object labels and multiple views, I'll estimate distances:

- obj_0 (gray): center position
- obj_1 (blue cube): behind/varies
- obj_2 (red): front or behind
- obj_3 (purple): front-left area
- obj_4 (cyan): behind or right

Based on careful analysis of all four images showing the same scene from different angles:

[fdr_0001] From obj_0 (gray): nearest are obj_4 (cyan, close behind), obj_2 (red, nearby), obj_3 (purple, moderate), obj_1 (blue cube, farthest behind)

[fdr_0002] From obj_1 (blue cube): obj_4 (cyan, closest), obj_0 (gray), obj_3 (purple), obj_2 (red, farthest front)

[fdr_0003] From obj_2 (red): obj_0 (gray, closest), obj_3 (purple), obj_4 (cyan), obj_1 (blue cube, farthest)

[fdr_0004] From obj_3 (purple): obj_4 (cyan, close), obj_0 (gray), obj_2 (red), obj_1 (blue cube, farthest)

[fdr_0005] From obj_4 (cyan): obj_0 (gray, closest), obj_3 (purple), obj_2 (red), obj_1 (blue cube, farthest)

[{"qid": "fdr_0001", "answer": ["obj_4", "obj_2", "obj_3", "obj_1"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0002", "answer": ["obj_4", "obj_0", "obj_3", "obj_2"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0003", "answer": ["obj_0", "obj_3", "obj_4", "obj_1"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0004", "answer": ["obj_4", "obj_0", "obj_2", "obj_1"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0005", "answer": ["obj_0", "obj_3", "obj_2", "obj_1"]}]

--- ReAct #1 ---
[{"qid": "fdr_0001", "answer": ["obj_4", "obj_2", "obj_3", "obj_1"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0002", "answer": ["obj_4", "obj_0", "obj_3", "obj_2"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0003", "answer": ["obj_0", "obj_3", "obj_4", "obj_1"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0004", "answer": ["obj_4", "obj_0", "obj_2", "obj_1"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0005", "answer": ["obj_0", "obj_3", "obj_2", "obj_1"]}]
